description: Percival Patch 11 (29 November 2019) — Yuletide Event, Avalonian Mob Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Uncle Frost is Back
sections.description: Group and solo Randomized Keeper Dungeons in T4-T8 zones have a chance to end in a special Yuletide Dungeon, where you'll face off against none other than Uncle Frost himself. Defeat this mysterious Yuletide foe for a rare chance to claim the Yule Stag Mount Skin and other festive loot!
sections.searchable_text: Uncle Frost is Back Yuletide Dungeon Keeper Dungeons T4 T8 Yule Stag Mount Skin festive loot

sections.heading: New Avatar Available
sections.description: A new Adventurer Avatar is now available at the Vanity Merchant for 3 Adventurer Tokens, obtainable by trading in unclaimed or already owned Adventurer's Challenge Avatar Rings. The Adventurer Avatar Ring is also available for 2 Adventurer Tokens.
sections.searchable_text: New Avatar Available Adventurer Avatar Vanity Merchant Adventurer Tokens Adventurer Avatar Ring

sections.heading: Avalonian Mob Changes
items: The Avalon Archer's Hitpoints have been increased by 50% and her Fame has been reduced by 33%
After extensive fasting and meditation, the Avalonian Acolyte's "Incense" spell has grown stronger
sections.searchable_text: Avalonian Mob Changes Avalon Archer Hitpoints Fame Avalonian Acolyte Incense spell

subsections.heading: Disarray (AKA Zerg Debuff)
subsections.searchable_text: Disarray Zerg Debuff values escalation updated forum post

changes.raw_text: Values and escalation for Disarray have been updated. For the new values and an explanation of the changes, please see this forum post: https://forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/119764-Disarray-Zerg-Debuff/?postID=964642#post964642
notes: Values and escalation for Disarray have been updated. For the new values and an explanation of the changes, please see this forum post: https://forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/119764-Disarray-Zerg-Debuff/?postID=964642#post964642

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Arcane Protection Duration 4s 2s Shield Strength 169.59 300.00

changes.raw_text: Arcane Protection (all Arcane Staffs): Duration: 4s → 2s Shield Strength: 169.59 → 300.00

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Rending Bleed stack bleed same target Axe Bleed Healing Reduction per stack 5% 4% Damage per Tick 5.2 5.4

changes.raw_text: Rending Bleed (all Axes): Now multiple players can stack the bleed on the same target
notes: Now multiple players can stack the bleed on the same target

changes.raw_text: Axe Bleed (all Axes): Healing Reduction per stack: 5% → 4% Damage per Tick: 5.2 → 5.4

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Exploding Bolt Damage 102.73 130.00 Hit Delay 0.4s 0.2s Standtime 0.4s 0.3s

changes.raw_text: Exploding Bolt (all Crossbows): Damage: 102.73 → 130.00 Hit Delay: 0.4s → 0.2s Standtime: 0.4s → 0.3s

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Giant Steps Forge Hammers Physical Resistance 0.59 0.35

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sacred Pulse Knockback Distance 8m 12m Cooldown 10s 8s Flash Heal Max Stacks 2 3 energy AoE Heal 5 allies 5m radius Base Heal 48 45

changes.raw_text: Sacred Pulse (all Holy Staffs): Knockback Distance: 8m → 12m Cooldown: 10s → 8s

Flash Heal (all Holy Staffs): Max Stacks: 2 → 3 Healing a target on Max Stacks don't give energy anymore Instead Max Stacks triggers an AoE Heal on the target; healing up to 5 allies for 50 in a 5m radius Base Heal: 48 → 45
notes: Healing a target on Max Stacks don't give energy anymore
Instead Max Stacks triggers an AoE Heal on the target; healing up to 5 allies for 50 in a 5m radius

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Thorns enemy players consumes stacks Spiritual Seed Druid Staff Cooldown 20s 25s

changes.raw_text: Thorns (all Nature Staffs): Getting hit by enemy players no longer consumes Thorns stacks
notes: Getting hit by enemy players no longer consumes Thorns stacks

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Iron Will Heroic Charge Parry Strike silences Spinning Blades Dual Swords Max Health Debuff unmounted Soulless Stream Galatine Pair Cast Time 0.9s 1.1s

changes.raw_text: Iron Will (all Swords): Now directly applies a Heroic Charge on you
notes: Now directly applies a Heroic Charge on you

changes.raw_text: Parry Strike (all Swords): No longer silences enemies
Spinning Blades (Dual Swords): Max Health Debuff now only affects unmounted players
notes: Max Health Debuff now only affects unmounted players

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Focused Run Scholar Shoes Movement Speed Increase 100% 70% Mark of Sacrifice Hellion Shoes Cast Range 15m 12m

changes.raw_text: Focused Run (Scholar Shoes): Movement Speed Increase: 100% → 70%
Mark of Sacrifice (Hellion Shoes): Cast Range: 15m → 12m

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Pierce Through Siege Ballista Cooldown 10s 20s Damage vs Mounts 3% 5% Damage vs Players 1.5% 2%

changes.raw_text: Pierce Through (Siege Ballista): Cooldown: 10s → 20s Damage vs Mounts: 3% → 5% Damage vs Players: 1.5% → 2%

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Zerg debuffs no longer apply to active GvG participants, regardless of how many allies are in the cluster

Updated the Guild Season reward brackets listed in the Rankings UI to display their correct values: Crystal: 180,000 points | Gold: 60,000 points | Silver: 15,000 points | Bronze: 3,500 points | Iron: 1,000 points
T6 Morgana mobs that snuck into T4 dungeons have been kicked out
Fixed an issue where farm buildings could not be demolished after picking up a grown crop or animal
Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staff): stun and invincibility now have the same duration, as intended
Additional numerous visual, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
